sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Anuam kumpi inn sungah i om zongin,
Ei inn sang a nuamzaw inn dang omlo hi;
inn nuam om hi” van pan hong ci zongin,
Ei inn sanga nuamzaw inn dang omlo

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Inn nuam, inn nuam pen, ei inn kan om kei

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Gamlak ka vak kawmin khapi ka en a,
Ka nu’n a ta hong phawk lamtak ka thei
Kong gei paak kiang pan khapi na en-en a,
Tua paak namtui ka dikkha nawn kei ding

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Inn pan taikhiat hang mun nuam dang omlopi,
Ka bukno khiukheu mahah hong tunkik
Kei hong lungnuamsak vasate’n la sa hi.
